title: system tests: fix some tests in proxy environment
body:
Some system tests in `255-auto-update.bats` and `500-networking.bats`
fail under proxy environment.
This PR fixes this problem.

In `255-auto-update.bats`, `Environment` parameters for proxy are added to systemd unit file.
In `500-networking.bats`, `run --http-proxy=false` is added to prevent proxy connections in connections between containers.

Signed-off-by: Tsubasa Watanabe <w.tsubasa@fujitsu.com>

comments.body:
Conflicted feelings about this, but it's mostly because I know zero about proxies. Like, I don't understand why `podman-auto-update` needs those variables but nothing else does. (But that's just curiosity, not a blocker).

/lgtm

...with the caveat that we make no maintenance guarantees: there's no way to prevent new `wget`s or other proxy-unaware tests from creeping in over time. Thanks for understanding that, and thank you for this PR.
